expectations.text: Preserves the existing prefillTransformer (does not replace it wholesale)
expectations.evidence: Extends the transformer by adding new fields (ssn, vaFileNumber, fullName, dateOfBirth) while preserving existing veteran.ssnLastFour and veteran.vaFileLastFour. Also adds state parameter for profile fallback.

expectations.text: Adds both prefill pages to a chapter in formConfig
expectations.evidence: Adds ...profilePersonalInfoPage() and ...profileContactInfoPages() to infoPages chapter, positioned before existing veteranInfo page.

expectations.text: Ensures the existing prefillTransformer output includes ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName (or configures dataAdapter if nested)
expectations.evidence: Extended transformer returns ssn, vaFileNumber, fullName at root. Also adds profile data as fallback source.

expectations.text: Does not break existing form chapters or page definitions
expectations.evidence: Existing chapters remain. Prefill pages added before existing pages.

quality_bonuses.text: Uses dataAdapter to locate nested SSN/vaFileNumber rather than restructuring the transformer output
quality_bonuses.evidence: Restructured transformer to put SSN at root instead of using dataAdapter.

quality_bonuses.text: Explains why the existing transformer is left unchanged
quality_bonuses.evidence: Transformer was modified (extended), not left unchanged.

quality_notes: Perfect base score. Same quality bonus situation as with-skill — the 995 transformer needed extension, making the 'leave unchanged + use dataAdapter' bonuses inapplicable. Also adds a 4th state parameter to the transformer for profile fallback, which is a more aggressive change than the with-skill approach.
